title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Vision Express India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Vision Express India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vision Express India family as a SEO Specialist in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vision Express India:
Vision Express India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
